skills_coverage.notes: JD skill substance is data engineering (pipelines, Teradata/SQL, Hadoop stack — Spark/Kafka/Hive, GCP/BigQuery, Tableau/Looker). Resume is entirely QA/testing. Only overlap is SQL, used for test-data validation/mining — a QA context, not data-engineering pipelines; adjacent at best. Hadoop stack, cloud data eng, BI dashboards all absent (no keyword, no adjacent). Broadly absent → 0. Note: no skills must items were recorded (JD's musts were only the degree/experience floor), so band geometry was undefined and this is a manual "essentially no match" call.

experience_level.notes: 14 years of dated experience, all QA/testing (Manager SQA → QA Lead → Test Lead → Senior QA Analyst, 2001–current). JD is Data Engineer; zero role-matching dated segments. Real, substantial experience but off-occupation → band 1 (no role-matching segments), not a proximity gap within the right role. This is the core of the No Fit label.

education_domain_fit.notes: Bachelor's in Computer Applications. Level fits the JD's Bachelor's ask cleanly. Field is computing — related to the data/software-engineering occupation but Computer Applications (applications/IT orientation) reads related-rather-than-core vs CS/data engineering. Level met + field adjacent → 3, not sub-graded. Note the degree-ledger item in hard_requirements is satisfied via the degree-OR-experience disjunction; this dimension scores fit quality only.

hard_requirements.notes: Ledger over the JD's two need-to-have musts. Degree = met (Bachelor's in Computer Applications satisfies the Bachelor's-OR-experience disjunction outright). Relevant-4+-years = unmet (14 yrs all QA/testing, zero role-matching segments for a Data Engineer JD, reusing the experience_level determination). One clear unmet → 0; soft veto fires (cap + gate). Aligns with dataset No Fit. Coupling note: the degree disjunction is met via its degree half, so the unmet years item is not double-counting the same evidence — degree passes independently of the experience floor.

hesitations: skills_coverage: no skills must items; band geometry undefined; the manual 0 is reasoned over duties + preferred-stack content, which stance A / the must-have framing exclude — rubric gap, rule decision deferred to between sessions (finding draft: no-skill-musts); gate reason insufficient_evidence refers to skills_coverage being scored without rubric-defined inputs; span corrections 2026-07-16 (scores untouched): education jd span re-pointed ('four' → 'Bachelor's degree'), experience resume span re-pointed (summary-claim '14' → dated segment), narrow spans widened to full phrases
